cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Kamla Devi ji, main Jana Small Finance Bank se bol raha hoon. Aapka account lock ho gaya hai.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Arre, kyu lock hua? Maine toh kuch galat nahi kiya.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Aapko tension lena ki zaroorat nahi hai, hum aapka account unlock kar denge. Sirf aap apna username aur password de do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Theek hai, lekin password kyu mang rahe ho? Achha, thik hai, mera username hai kamla123 aur password...

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, thik hai. Hum aapka account unlock kar dete hain. Aapko ab koi tension lena ki zaroorat nahi hai.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Aapka account unlock ho gaya hai. Aap ab apne account mein login kar sakte hain.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 72s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
